summary: Iteration 50: Category Colors Bug Fix - VERIFIED WORKING. All 6 test appointments on 2026-04-10 display distinct colors based on service category. Backend API returns services with category field populated. Repair-categories endpoint works correctly.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/appointments?date=2026-04-10 - Returns 6 appointments with category in services
3. All 8 categories have distinct colors defined
4. All services have valid category values
5. New appointment creation includes category in services
6. Category enrichment on GET works correctly
7-12. Category color mapping tests (taglio, piega, colore, trattamento, permanente, stiratura)
13. Day View - 6 appointment cards with distinct colors
20. Week View - Same 6 appointments with correct colors
21. Category Legend - All 8 categories visible (Taglio, Piega, Trattamenti, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamenti, Altro, Cancellato)
critical_code_review_comments: Category colors bug fix is COMPLETE and WORKING
DayView.jsx and WeekView.jsx both use getAppointmentColor() from categories.js
Backend enriches missing categories on GET /api/appointments using master services list
POST /api/appointments/repair-categories endpoint available to patch old appointments
All 8 categories have distinct colors: taglio=#0EA5E9, piega=#F97316, colore=#10B981, trattamento=#F59E0B, permanente=#8B5CF6, stiratura=#EC4899, abbonamento=#6366F1, altro=#64748B
seed_data_creation: Test data already created by main agent: 6 appointments on 2026-04-10 with different categories (taglio, piega, colore, trattamento, permanente, stiratura)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified the category colors bug fix. All appointment cards now display distinct colors based on service category. The fix centralized getAppointmentColor() in categories.js and added 'piega' category. Backend enriches missing categories on GET. Test appointments exist on 2026-04-10 with 6 different categories.

category_colors_day_view.description: Each appointment card shows distinct background color based on service category

category_colors_week_view.description: Same distinct colors appear in week view

category_legend.description: All 8 categories visible in legend (Taglio, Piega, Trattamenti, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamenti, Altro) plus Cancellato

get_appointments_api.description: Returns services with category field populated
